TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Sabah Al-Ahmad Al-Jaber Al-Sabah = Mntucing hngkawas 1929 idas 6 jiyax 6 ka Sabah Al-Ahmad Al-Jaber Al-Sabah ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Kuwait ta sayang o kiya ka Sabah Al-Ahmad Al-Jaber Al-Sabah, pnaah hngkawas 2006 idas 1 jiyax 29 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. = Nawaf Al-Ahmad Al-Jaber Al-Sabah = Nawaf Al-Ahmad Al-Jaber Al-Sabah u Kuwait tu10 Amir Al-Ahmad Al-Jaber Al-Sabah na tu6 laqi snaw, tu13 Amir Al-Ahmad Al-Jaber Al-Sabah mi tu15 Amir Sabah Al-Ahmad Al-Jaber Al-Sabah ini pntna bubu na swayi. Kndusan Nawaf u mntuting kngkawas 1937, kngkawas 1978 dhuq 2006 ngalan Kuwait Neycng Tacn, kngkawas 2003 idas 7 diyax 13 cyeynjn Huku Sosyang, kiya mi kngkawas 2003 idas 10 diyax 16 cida wada phyuwan tu1 Huku Sosyang. Kngkawas 2006 idas 1 daw wada psdhuwan phyuwan Amirka Saad Al-Abdullah Al-Salim Al-Sabah, Nawaf ka ngalan rmirih Sosyang. Idas 1 diyax 29, ini pntna bubu na qbsuran Sabah Al-Ahmad Al-Jaber Al-Sabah ka psdhuwan phiyu Amir, Nawaf u mniq idas 2 diyax 7 wada psdhuwan Wangcu, wada pstuq Kuwait Wangs mnuda 90 knkawas wana llutuc Al-Jaber mi Al-Sabah ka msriyux phyuwan ka pnsltudan. Kngkawas 2020 idas 9 diyax 29, wada mrdang ka Sabah Al-Ahmad Al-Jaber Al-Sabah daw, Wangcu Nawaf Al-Ahmad Al-Jaber Al-Sabah ka pusa kari psdhuwan phiyu Amir Kuwait. Tnsapah Nawaf Al-Ahmad Al-Jaber Al-Sabah mniq kngkkawas 50 tuhuy Sharifa bint Sulaiman Al-Jasem msturung, wada msupu tmlaqi 4 laqi snaw mi 1 laqi qridin: Qbsuran balay laqi snaw ka Ahmad, mntuting kngkawas 1956, Kuwait Sinsi Tacn. Niqan 1 laqi nanaw mi 1 laqi qridin. Tu2 laqi snaw ka Faisal, mntuting kngkawas 1957 idas 1, kngkawas 1984 mangal qridin, niqan taxa laqi qridin. Tu3 laqi snaw ka 'Abdullah, kngkawas 1958 mntuting. Tu4 laqi snaw ka Snlim, mntuting kngkawas 1960. Qbsuran laqi qridin ka Shaikha, wada sediq tnsapah Al-Sabah na Al-Jaber Cinwang.
S.PHON: = sabaħ al-aħmad al-ɟabəɾ al-sabaħ = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * ka sabaħ al-aħmad al-ɟabəɾ al-sabaħ ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan kuwait ta sajaŋ o kija ka sabaħ al-aħmad al-ɟabəɾ al-sabaħ, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. = nawa* al-aħmad al-ɟabəɾ al-sabaħ = nawa* al-aħmad al-ɟabəɾ al-sabaħ u kuwait tu** amiɾ al-aħmad al-ɟabəɾ al-sabaħ na tu* laqi snaw, tu** amiɾ al-aħmad al-ɟabəɾ al-sabaħ mi tu** amiɾ sabaħ al-aħmad al-ɟabəɾ al-sabaħ ini pntna bubu na swaji. kndusan nawa* u mntutiŋ kŋkawas ****, kŋkawas **** dħuq **** ŋalan kuwait nəʦŋ taʦn, kŋkawas **** idas * dijax ** ʦjənɟn ħuku sosjaŋ, kija mi kŋkawas **** idas ** dijax ** ʦida wada pħjuwan tu* ħuku sosjaŋ. kŋkawas **** idas * daw wada psdħuwan pħjuwan amiɾka saad al-abdullaħ al-salim al-sabaħ, nawa* ka ŋalan ɾmiɾiħ sosjaŋ. idas * dijax **, ini pntna bubu na qbsuɾan sabaħ al-aħmad al-ɟabəɾ al-sabaħ ka psdħuwan pħiju amiɾ, nawa* u mniq idas * dijax * wada psdħuwan waŋʦu, wada pstuq kuwait waŋs mnuda ** knkawas wana llutuʦ al-ɟabəɾ mi al-sabaħ ka msɾijux pħjuwan ka pnsltudan. kŋkawas **** idas * dijax **, wada mɾdaŋ ka sabaħ al-aħmad al-ɟabəɾ al-sabaħ daw, waŋʦu nawa* al-aħmad al-ɟabəɾ al-sabaħ ka pusa kaɾi psdħuwan pħiju amiɾ kuwait. tnsapaħ nawa* al-aħmad al-ɟabəɾ al-sabaħ mniq kŋkkawas ** tuħuj sħaɾi*a bint sulaiman al-ɟasəm mstuɾuŋ, wada msupu tmlaqi * laqi snaw mi * laqi qɾidin: qbsuɾan balaj laqi snaw ka aħmad, mntutiŋ kŋkawas ****, kuwait sinsi taʦn. niqan * laqi nanaw mi * laqi qɾidin. tu* laqi snaw ka *aisal, mntutiŋ kŋkawas **** idas *, kŋkawas **** maŋal qɾidin, niqan taxa laqi qɾidin. tu* laqi snaw ka 'abdullaħ, kŋkawas **** mntutiŋ. tu* laqi snaw ka snlim, mntutiŋ kŋkawas ****. qbsuɾan laqi qɾidin ka sħaikħa, wada sədiq tnsapaħ al-sabaħ na al-ɟabəɾ ʦinwaŋ.
S.FORM: = Sabah Al-Ahmad Al-Jaber Al-Sabah = Mntucing hngkawas 1929 idas 6 jiyax 6 ka Sabah Al-Ahmad Al-Jaber Al-Sabah ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Kuwait ta sayang o kiya ka Sabah Al-Ahmad Al-Jaber Al-Sabah, pnaah hngkawas 2006 idas 1 jiyax 29 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. = Nawaf Al-Ahmad Al-Jaber Al-Sabah = Nawaf Al-Ahmad Al-Jaber Al-Sabah u Kuwait tu10 Amir Al-Ahmad Al-Jaber Al-Sabah na tu6 laqi snaw, tu13 Amir Al-Ahmad Al-Jaber Al-Sabah mi tu15 Amir Sabah Al-Ahmad Al-Jaber Al-Sabah ini pntna bubu na swayi. Kndusan Nawaf u mntuting kngkawas 1937, kngkawas 1978 dhuq 2006 ngalan Kuwait Neycng Tacn, kngkawas 2003 idas 7 diyax 13 cyeynjn Huku Sosyang, kiya mi kngkawas 2003 idas 10 diyax 16 cida wada phyuwan tu1 Huku Sosyang. Kngkawas 2006 idas 1 daw wada psdhuwan phyuwan Amirka Saad Al-Abdullah Al-Salim Al-Sabah, Nawaf ka ngalan rmirih Sosyang. Idas 1 diyax 29, ini pntna bubu na qbsuran Sabah Al-Ahmad Al-Jaber Al-Sabah ka psdhuwan phiyu Amir, Nawaf u mniq idas 2 diyax 7 wada psdhuwan Wangcu, wada pstuq Kuwait Wangs mnuda 90 knkawas wana llutuc Al-Jaber mi Al-Sabah ka msriyux phyuwan ka pnsltudan. Kngkawas 2020 idas 9 diyax 29, wada mrdang ka Sabah Al-Ahmad Al-Jaber Al-Sabah daw, Wangcu Nawaf Al-Ahmad Al-Jaber Al-Sabah ka pusa kari psdhuwan phiyu Amir Kuwait. Tnsapah Nawaf Al-Ahmad Al-Jaber Al-Sabah mniq kngkkawas 50 tuhuy Sharifa bint Sulaiman Al-Jasem msturung, wada msupu tmlaqi 4 laqi snaw mi 1 laqi qridin: Qbsuran balay laqi snaw ka Ahmad, mntuting kngkawas 1956, Kuwait Sinsi Tacn. Niqan 1 laqi nanaw mi 1 laqi qridin. Tu2 laqi snaw ka Faisal, mntuting kngkawas 1957 idas 1, kngkawas 1984 mangal qridin, niqan taxa laqi qridin. Tu3 laqi snaw ka 'Abdullah, kngkawas 1958 mntuting. Tu4 laqi snaw ka Snlim, mntuting kngkawas 1960. Qbsuran laqi qridin ka Shaikha, wada sediq tnsapah Al-Sabah na Al-Jaber Cinwang.
